summary: Implemented P0-06 source/chunk/claim lineage as an executable completion gate. Added source lineage status builder, regression verifier, health/freshness refresh wiring, verify:goal requirement, Observatory API/UI exposure, and documentation updates. Verified fixture and real data vault health, then committed and pushed app and selected data status evidence.
decisions: P0-06 is now completion-grade only when verified source chunks, provenance records, bounded chunk text, source URI, and non-dangling claim_paths are present.
Behavior/internal operating memories are separated from factual source-backed claims so user preference records are not falsely treated as unsupported public claims.
Anchor-only URL records remain visible but cannot satisfy verified claim support.
verify:goal now includes source_chunk_claim_provenance_lineage and current real data vault status must be healthy.
Generated data commit was scoped to source lineage status plus health/monitoring evidence, leaving existing backlog untouched.
next_steps: Run npm run codex:hooks:approval to clear stale DinoBrain MCP processes, then rerun npm run verify:goal in a fresh Codex proof window.
Resolve task lifecycle blockers: 4 stale active tasks and 2 terminal tasks missing traces, then rerun task:lifecycle and task:lifecycle:settle.
Implement completion-grade semantic retrieval provider and generated-answer quality evaluation so RAG completion no longer blocks on local_text_hashing_v1.
search_queries: source lineage status provenance source chunks verified claim support
native instruction authority verify goal source_lineage
